mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Nice job out there, you!
That was SUCH an amazing win!

TextInfos.Text: Nice job out there, you!
That was SUCH an amazing win!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I watched the whole battle and I actually
screamed out loud when you won! No, for real!

TextInfos.Text: I watched the whole battle and I actually
screamed out loud when you won! No, for real!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Just gotta say—that was an amazing match!
You and your team took that win home in style!

TextInfos.Text: Just gotta say—that was an amazing match!
You and your team took that win home in style!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Big congrats on your win! Grandpa
and I are so proud of you, you know.

TextInfos.Text: Big congrats on your win! Grandpa
and I are so proud of you, you know.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Phew, you kept me on the edge of my seat!
Heart-pounding battles sure are the best, huh?

TextInfos.Text: Phew, you kept me on the edge of my seat!
Heart-pounding battles sure are the best, huh?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Aw... Don’t worry, you’ll get ’em next time!
Maybe you could ask Grandpa for advice?

TextInfos.Text: Aw... Don’t worry, you’ll get ’em next time!
Maybe you could ask Grandpa for advice?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
That was tough, but you put up a great fight!
With your resolve, I know you’ll win next time.

TextInfos.Text: That was tough, but you put up a great fight!
With your resolve, I know you’ll win next time.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Welcome back! Have a little rest here with
your Pokémon before rushing off again, OK?

TextInfos.Text: Welcome back! Have a little rest here with
your Pokémon before rushing off again, OK?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Hey, great work out there. You fought hard!
I’ll bring you some well-earned snacks in a bit!

TextInfos.Text: Hey, great work out there. You fought hard!
I’ll bring you some well-earned snacks in a bit!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Sometimes things don’t go the way we hope...
Try not to dwell on it. Just focus on the next one!

TextInfos.Text: Sometimes things don’t go the way we hope...
Try not to dwell on it. Just focus on the next one!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Guh, sorry that one didn’t quite work out...
I’m sure you’ll turn it around in your next battle!

TextInfos.Text: Guh, sorry that one didn’t quite work out...
I’m sure you’ll turn it around in your next battle!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I may not be able to give you any battle advice,
but I’ll support you however else you need.

TextInfos.Text: I may not be able to give you any battle advice,
but I’ll support you however else you need.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Wh-what happened? I just heard the result
and geez... I’m sorry it didn’t go your way!

TextInfos.Text: Wh-what happened? I just heard the result
and geez... I’m sorry it didn’t go your way!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s OK to be a bit upset now, but just think how
amazing you’ll feel when you ace the next battle!

TextInfos.Text: It’s OK to be a bit upset now, but just think how
amazing you’ll feel when you ace the next battle!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Nooo, I can’t believe it!
That’s SO frustrating!!!

TextInfos.Text: Nooo, I can’t believe it!
That’s SO frustrating!!!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s cool—brush it off! On to the next one!
Let’s just forget that ever happened!

TextInfos.Text: It’s cool—brush it off! On to the next one!
Let’s just forget that ever happened!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ve been working so hard! Ready to rest up?
Or would you rather keep on battling?

TextInfos.Text: You’ve been working so hard! Ready to rest up?
Or would you rather keep on battling?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, hey! Thanks for dropping in today.
Let me know if you need anything, OK?

TextInfos.Text: Well, hey! Thanks for dropping in today.
Let me know if you need anything, OK?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Good luck! I’ll be cheering you on from here!

TextInfos.Text: Good luck! I’ll be cheering you on from here!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: I can’t wait to see more of your battles!

TextInfos.Text: I can’t wait to see more of your battles!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’re aiming to be a Pokémon Champion,
right? Well, I know you can do it!

TextInfos.Text: You’re aiming to be a Pokémon Champion,
right? Well, I know you can do it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Nothing much to do without any visitors.
I guess I could order some supplies...

TextInfos.Text: Nothing much to do without any visitors.
I guess I could order some supplies...

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
We’re letting others use the Gym Court too, so
you might find yourself with some spectators!

TextInfos.Text: We’re letting others use the Gym Court too, so
you might find yourself with some spectators!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
This gym gets dirty in no time at all...
Guess I’ll do another lap with the broom!

TextInfos.Text: This gym gets dirty in no time at all...
Guess I’ll do another lap with the broom!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s so nice that you can battle just for fun.
Keep your practice seshes casual, OK?

TextInfos.Text: It’s so nice that you can battle just for fun.
Keep your practice seshes casual, OK?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Why don’t you go say hi to Grandpa?
I know he’s always happy to see you!

TextInfos.Text: Why don’t you go say hi to Grandpa?
I know he’s always happy to see you!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Caraway’s so cool when she’s doing her
modeling thing! I watch ALL her videos!

TextInfos.Text: Caraway’s so cool when she’s doing her
modeling thing! I watch ALL her videos!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The Maractus I caught just
won’t listen to a word I say...

TextInfos.Text: The Maractus I caught just
won’t listen to a word I say...

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Can’t make up your mind, huh?
I feel you. Neither can I!

TextInfos.Text: Can’t make up your mind, huh?
I feel you. Neither can I!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Your battles are always so intense.
I get worked up just watching them!

TextInfos.Text: Your battles are always so intense.
I get worked up just watching them!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Can’t decide what to go for?
How about Ranked Battles?

TextInfos.Text: Can’t decide what to go for?
How about Ranked Battles?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Private Battles are a blast with friends.
You can battle all you want, easy breezy!

TextInfos.Text: Private Battles are a blast with friends.
You can battle all you want, easy breezy!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Know about the Battle Data feature?
It lets you see all sorts of rankings!

TextInfos.Text: Know about the Battle Data feature?
It lets you see all sorts of rankings!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Official Competitions are the perfect place
to put your hard-earned skills to the test!

TextInfos.Text: Official Competitions are the perfect place
to put your hard-earned skills to the test!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Ranked Battles are worth taking seriously.
Just don’t let your nerves get the best of you!

TextInfos.Text: Ranked Battles are worth taking seriously.
Just don’t let your nerves get the best of you!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Check your Battle Team, then start
matchmaking! You ready to go?

TextInfos.Text: Check your Battle Team, then start
matchmaking! You ready to go?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Hey, did you hear? A new season’s begun!
You should check out the new regulations.

TextInfos.Text: Hey, did you hear? A new season’s begun!
You should check out the new regulations.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Hey! Seems like a new competition’s begun!
You should check out the News announcements.

TextInfos.Text: Hey! Seems like a new competition’s begun!
You should check out the News announcements.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’ve got something new I’d like to teach ya!
Check out the tutorials if you’re interested.

TextInfos.Text: I’ve got something new I’d like to teach ya!
Check out the tutorials if you’re interested.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Nice work out there. If you want me to coach
you on anything else, come and ask anytime.

TextInfos.Text: Nice work out there. If you want me to coach
you on anything else, come and ask anytime.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Ain’t no getting around the basics.
I’ll drill ’em all into you, and then some!

TextInfos.Text: Ain’t no getting around the basics.
I’ll drill ’em all into you, and then some!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ve got the basics down to a tee!
All that’s left is to put ’em into practice.

TextInfos.Text: You’ve got the basics down to a tee!
All that’s left is to put ’em into practice.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Anything else? I’ll train up your
Pokémon as much as you need!

TextInfos.Text: Anything else? I’ll train up your
Pokémon as much as you need!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Don’t forget—Pokémon need held items, hear?
Victory belongs to the well-prepared!

TextInfos.Text: Don’t forget—Pokémon need held items, hear?
Victory belongs to the well-prepared!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
All set? Think carefully—training Pokémon is
something worth doing right if it’s done at all.

TextInfos.Text: All set? Think carefully—training Pokémon is
something worth doing right if it’s done at all.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Me and Kajima go way back, you know.
He trains his Pokémon here at the gym.

TextInfos.Text: Me and Kajima go way back, you know.
He trains his Pokémon here at the gym.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
If you’re not sure which Pokémon to pick for
your team, try ones that cover your weak spots!

TextInfos.Text: If you’re not sure which Pokémon to pick for
your team, try ones that cover your weak spots!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
When you’re training a Pokémon, be sure to
maximize its strengths first and foremost.

TextInfos.Text: When you’re training a Pokémon, be sure to
maximize its strengths first and foremost.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Have you tailored your team’s stat alignments?
Choosing Brave will increase the Attack stat!

TextInfos.Text: Have you tailored your team’s stat alignments?
Choosing
Brave
will increase the Attack stat!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Studying’s good, but I’d say experience is better.
You gotta get out there and battle, battle, battle!

TextInfos.Text: Studying’s good, but I’d say experience is better.
You gotta get out there and battle, battle, battle!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Held items are critical to a team’s success.
Don’t forget ’em once you’re done training.

TextInfos.Text: Held items are critical to a team’s success.
Don’t forget ’em once you’re done training.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Looking at these tired ol’ punching bags brings
back memories of all the teams I’ve trained.

TextInfos.Text: Looking at these tired ol’ punching bags brings
back memories of all the teams I’ve trained.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
As long as a Pokémon’s able to learn a move,
you can teach it that move whenever!

TextInfos.Text: As long as a Pokémon’s able to learn a move,
you can teach it that move whenever!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Welcome back! Spend some time with the
Pokémon here ’fore you mosey on out!

TextInfos.Text: Welcome back! Spend some time with the
Pokémon here ’fore you mosey on out!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
If you see a li’l cutie you wanna recruit,
I can bring ’em over to ya lickety-split!

TextInfos.Text: If you see a li’l cutie you wanna recruit,
I can bring ’em over to ya lickety-split!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, I’ll be! You’ve got a ticket, don’tcha?
Go on and use it if ya like!

TextInfos.Text: Well, I’ll be! You’ve got a ticket, don’tcha?
Go on and use it if ya like!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Looks like you’ve got yerself a visitor! It traveled
a long way to get here, so it must really love ya!

TextInfos.Text: Looks like you’ve got yerself a visitor! It traveled
a long way to get here, so it must really love ya!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Our Pokémon are all battle-ready, seein’ as
I take such good care of ’em! Yessiree!

TextInfos.Text: Our Pokémon are all battle-ready, seein’ as
I take such good care of ’em! Yessiree!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
All the li’l darlin’s here come leapin’ outta
the tall grass whenever I holler for ’em!

TextInfos.Text: All the li’l darlin’s here come leapin’ outta
the tall grass whenever I holler for ’em!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Not sure why, but it feels more excitin’
’round these parts with you battlin’ and all!

TextInfos.Text: Not sure why, but it feels more excitin’
’round these parts with you battlin’ and all!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
This here Roster Ranch is real popular.
We get all kinds of folk comin’ to visit!

TextInfos.Text: This here Roster Ranch is real popular.
We get all kinds of folk comin’ to visit!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I ain’t actually all that savvy about
Pokémon stats ’n’ strengths and all that.

TextInfos.Text: I ain’t actually all that savvy about
Pokémon stats ’n’ strengths and all that.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Howdy there—nice timing!
Our li’l darlin’s are rarin’ to go!

TextInfos.Text: Howdy there—nice timing!
Our li’l darlin’s are rarin’ to go!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Thanks for stoppin’ by! My li’l darlin’s
are keen and ready whenever you are!

TextInfos.Text: Thanks for stoppin’ by! My li’l darlin’s
are keen and ready whenever you are!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You ever feel like slowing down
and taking it easy? Just me?

TextInfos.Text: You ever feel like slowing down
and taking it easy? Just me?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Joining rooms made by a friend is easy peasy.
Just ask them for the Room ID and away you go!

TextInfos.Text: Joining rooms made by a friend is easy peasy.
Just ask them for the Room ID and away you go!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Aaand...there! Just ordered a bunch of
Protein bottles! That should last us a while.

TextInfos.Text: Aaand...there! Just ordered a bunch of
Protein bottles! That should last us a while.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The cure for battle fatigue? More battles!
But don’t overdo it, ya hear?

TextInfos.Text: The cure for battle fatigue? More battles!
But don’t overdo it, ya hear?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Back where I’m from, Lumiose Galettes
are popular as anything! Wanna try one?

TextInfos.Text: Back where I’m from, Lumiose Galettes
are popular as anything! Wanna try one?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’ve prepped some assignments for ya. I call ’em
Cordy’s missions—they’re perfect battle practice!

TextInfos.Text: I’ve prepped some assignments for ya. I call ’em
Cordy’s missions—they’re perfect battle practice!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Oof... Aaah... That sure hits the spot.
C’mon—you should limber up too!

TextInfos.Text: Oof... Aaah... That sure hits the spot.
C’mon—you should limber up too!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
They say every journey starts with
a single step, so let’s get stepping!

TextInfos.Text: They say every journey starts with
a single step, so let’s get stepping!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Hellooo? Still there, ain’tcha?
You decided what to do yet?

TextInfos.Text: Hellooo? Still there, ain’tcha?
You decided what to do yet?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
We’ve got aaall kinds of Pokémon.
Don’t be shy—recruit a whole bunch!

TextInfos.Text: We’ve got aaall kinds of Pokémon.
Don’t be shy—recruit a whole bunch!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Just holler at me if you need to return
any li’l darlin’s you recruited, OK?

TextInfos.Text: Just holler at me if you need to return
any li’l darlin’s you recruited, OK?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Lemme know if you wanna send back
any Pokémon visitin’ from far away!

TextInfos.Text: Lemme know if you wanna send back
any Pokémon visitin’ from far away!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Thanks for stoppin’ by! The Pokémon are havin’
fun rollin’ around in the fields if ya wanna join in.

TextInfos.Text: Thanks for stoppin’ by! The Pokémon are havin’
fun rollin’ around in the fields if ya wanna join in.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Somethin’ tells me you’ve got a Pokémon
visitin’! Let’s go say howdy, shall we?

TextInfos.Text: Somethin’ tells me you’ve got a Pokémon
visitin’! Let’s go say howdy, shall we?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, lookee here! Someone’s got a ticket or two!
Better use ’em quick before ya forget!

TextInfos.Text: Well, lookee here! Someone’s got a ticket or two!
Better use ’em quick before ya forget!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Wanna meet some new li’l darlin’s?
Mighty fine time to use a ticket if so!

TextInfos.Text: Wanna meet some new li’l darlin’s?
Mighty fine time to use a ticket if so!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You came by at a great time! We just
opened up a brand spankin’ new roster!

TextInfos.Text: You came by at a great time! We just
opened up a brand spankin’ new roster!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Thanks for stoppin’ by! Ol’ Kitt can help
you out with all your recruitin’ needs!

TextInfos.Text: Thanks for stoppin’ by! Ol’ Kitt can help
you out with all your recruitin’ needs!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
One-on-one battles are fierce, aren’t they?
Nowhere to go but straight at your opponent!

TextInfos.Text: One-on-one battles are fierce, aren’t they?
Nowhere to go but straight at your opponent!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Two-on-two battles are twice as complex, but
also twice as exciting. They’re a thrill, I tell ya!

TextInfos.Text: Two-on-two battles are twice as complex, but
also twice as exciting. They’re a thrill, I tell ya!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The bonds between a Trainer and their Pokémon
can lead to all sorts of miracles, that’s for sure!

TextInfos.Text: The bonds between a Trainer and their Pokémon
can lead to all sorts of miracles, that’s for sure!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You know, there are moves that let you attack
first even if your opponent has the higher Speed.

TextInfos.Text: You know, there are moves that let you attack
first even if your opponent has the higher Speed.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Some moves rely on brute strength, while
others deal damage using unique powers.

TextInfos.Text: Some moves rely on brute strength, while
others deal damage using unique powers.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Poison and paralysis can make or break
a battle. They’re hugely useful tools!

TextInfos.Text: Poison and paralysis can make or break
a battle. They’re hugely useful tools!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Some moves have effects that trigger when an
opponent makes contact with the user, you know.

TextInfos.Text: Some moves have effects that trigger when an
opponent makes contact with the user, you know.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Lots of moves and Abilities make use of
the weather. See if they suit your strategy!

TextInfos.Text: Lots of moves and Abilities make use of
the weather. See if they suit your strategy!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Terrains sure are powerful, but remember—
they only affect Pokémon on the ground!

TextInfos.Text: Terrains sure are powerful, but remember—
they only affect Pokémon on the ground!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Complete my tutorials and you’ll get rewards for
your trouble! Go on—give ’em a try!

TextInfos.Text: Complete my tutorials and you’ll get rewards for
your trouble! Go on—give ’em a try!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Single or Double Battle?
Which will it be?

TextInfos.Text: Single or Double Battle?
Which will it be?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Why not invite your friends to join a room?
Just make sure you check the Room ID!

TextInfos.Text: Why not invite your friends to join a room?
Just make sure you check the Room ID!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Ooh, trying the Beginner Tier, are we?
Relax—you’ll do great. Break a leg!

TextInfos.Text: Ooh, trying the Beginner Tier, are we?
Relax—you’ll do great. Break a leg!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Casual Battles are great for testing out
new Battle Teams. Wanna give it a go?

TextInfos.Text: Casual Battles are great for testing out
new Battle Teams. Wanna give it a go?
